case_title: ANNIE CHAN VS. JAVIER CORTES et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-12-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-12-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. RAYMOND SIN INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, ANNIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CORTES, JAVIER CORTES, MARVIN CORTES, RITA M. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
